question: What is the centerpiece of the image? Select from the following options: (A) A wedding cake on the cover of a magazine. (B) A cover of a magazine with a cake on a table with flowers and plants. (C) A cake on a table with antlers on it. (D) Not enough information to determine.
gold_answer: A cover of a magazine with a cake on a table with flowers and plants

A cake on a table with antlers on it
